courses.title: Starter English
courses.description: Complete A1 English pathway for British English Academy learners with structured lessons, activities, assessments, resources and SCORM-ready modules.

modules.title: Identity, goals and learner profile
modules.summary: introductions, routines, aspirations, personal information
modules.vocabulary: personal details, goals, classroom objects, numbers, dates

modules.title: Family, community and relationships
modules.summary: people, roles, feelings, social routines
modules.vocabulary: family, personality, emotions, community places

modules.title: School, study and work
modules.summary: classroom language, learning habits, jobs, workplace communication
modules.vocabulary: subjects, study skills, jobs, duties, workplace phrases

modules.title: Home, city and daily life
modules.summary: places, transport, directions, services, everyday problems
modules.vocabulary: rooms, furniture, transport, maps, services

modules.title: Food, health and wellbeing
modules.summary: meals, choices, advice, body, wellness, appointments
modules.vocabulary: food groups, symptoms, healthy habits, advice

modules.title: Travel, cultures and the wider world
modules.summary: journeys, places, customs, comparisons, global issues
modules.vocabulary: countries, landscapes, travel problems, cultural routines

modules.title: Media, technology and digital citizenship
modules.summary: online messages, news, safety, opinions, presentation
modules.vocabulary: devices, apps, online behaviour, news, opinions

modules.title: Stories, literature and creative expression
modules.summary: narratives, characters, plot, poetry, performance
modules.vocabulary: genres, characters, settings, plot, figurative language

modules.title: Problems, solutions and critical thinking
modules.summary: cause/effect, evidence, debate, solutions
modules.vocabulary: environment, social issues, cause/effect, solution language

modules.title: Portfolio project and progress review
modules.summary: integrated skills, reflection, revision, certification task
modules.vocabulary: review, reflection, portfolio language, self-assessment terms
